business_ideas.idea: AI analyzes YouTube channel performance and auto-generates viral content strategy
Personal software: deliver massively customized experiences tuned to each user
Vibe coding: describe rough intent and AI iteratively builds it with user feedback
Business content strategy focusing on video essays over thumbnails and trends

predictions.text: Software will shift from centralized products to personalized AI-curated experiences
Mass creator supply plus algorithmic curation enables personalization across all software
Newsfeeds were first pass at personalization; next is personalized software for everything
